Localization.Description: Possible connection to the Mimikatz RPC server. Attackers can connect to the Mimikatz RPC server on victim's computer to remotely execute commands using the mimikatz.py tool from the Impacket toolkit.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible connection to the Mimikatz RPC server ({object.process.name}) on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using the mimikatz.py tool from the Impacket toolkit from host {src.host}
